_description: Concept explanation lesson: intro → narration blocks → concept diagram → key insight quote → outro
_usage: Copy this template, fill in your content, remove underscore-prefixed keys, run: node studio/render-lesson.js your-config.json
title: Your Lesson Title
subtitle: Course Name — Like One Academy

sections.text: Opening hook. Explain the core concept in 2-3 sentences that create curiosity. End with a question or surprising claim.
sections._notes: durationS is auto-calculated from TTS. highlightWords get warm accent color.

sections.label: Concept Diagram Title
sections._notes: x/y are 0-1 proportional to diagram area. connections reference node indices.

sections.text: Deeper explanation. Now that the visual is established, explain the relationships. Use concrete analogies.
Real-world application. Connect the concept to something the viewer cares about. Make it practical and actionable.

sections.quote: A memorable quote that reinforces the lesson's core idea.
